r.$description: Radius — moderate, disciplined. Sharp enough to read bold, soft enough to be usable.

2xl.$description: splash tile — distinct from xl's app icon tile

scrim.$description:
Overlay scrim — backdrop for anything that covers the app (Dialog,
ConfirmDialog, CommandPalette, Onboarding). The blur is what separates a
modal from a coachmark: Dialog/ConfirmDialog/CommandPalette pair the scrim
with --scrim-blur, Onboarding uses the scrim alone, because a tour that
blurs the product it is touring defeats itself.

loop.$description:
Cyclical motion. Deliberately not part of dur: a transition is a
response to an action and is measured in the hundred-millisecond range; a loop
reports that work is ongoing and is measured in seconds. Merging them would
repeat the fs/dz mistake the type scale already retired. `reduced` is the one
value prefers-reduced-motion slows every working loop to — it was copied into
three files before it was a token.

brand.$description: Rotor — slow enough to read as presence rather than progress

reduced.$description: What a working loop slows to under prefers-reduced-motion. Motion that reports work slows rather than stopping: a frozen spinner reads as a hung process.

brand-reduced.$description: Rotor's reduced step — the brand mark is three times slower again, because it is decoration that happens to also mean 'alive'
